text:
is a student at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Dennis has medium-length messy brown hair, a slight stubble and dark gray eyes. He is seen wearing the standard male uniform of the school.

Story

In the student council club room, Dennis is caught betting on beetle sumo matches with two other club members, and is reported by the Newspaper Club member, Ilse Langnar.
